zh.lifeSummary: Edward Barrett是Barrett的兒子，於大約1249年出生在英國肯特。他和Mrs. Edward Barrett至少有1個兒子。他去世於1315年在英國英格蘭享年67歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Edward Barrett是Barrett的儿子，于大约1249年出生在英国肯特。他和Mrs. Edward Barrett至少有1个儿子。他去世于1315年在英国英格兰享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: Barrett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): probably a nickname for a quarrelsome person, from Old French barat, Middle English bar(r)at, bar(r)et(te) ‘trouble, distress’, later ‘deception, fraud; contention, strife’. Through Norman settlement it also became common in Ireland, where it was Gaelicized as Baróid (Munster) and Baréid (Connacht).

variants.name: Barret
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Matthieu, Mirlande, Philippe.

French: derivative of the topographic name   Barre   1 ‘barrier’, or a habitational name from a place called with this word. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 3 below) is also found in Haiti.

variants.name: Baratta
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Carmine, Pasquale, Alfonse, Antonio, Carmela, Guido, Salvatore, Vincenzo.
Italian: occupational name for a market trader, especially in northern Italy, from baratta ‘exchange, sale, buying and selling’, a derivative of barattare ‘to barter’. See also Barrett .

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: Edward Barrett was born about 1249, in Kent, England as the son of Barrett. He had at least 1 son with Mrs. Edward Barrett. He died in 1315, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Edward Barrett est né environ 1249, à Kent, Angleterre, fils de Barrett. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Mrs. Edward Barrett. Il est décédé en 1315, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Edward Barrett wurde um 1249 in Kent, England, als Sohn von Barrett geboren. Er hatte mit Mrs. Edward Barrett mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1315 im Alter von 67 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Edward Barrett è nato il circa 1249 nel Kent, England come figlio di Barrett. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Mrs. Edward Barrett. Morì nel 1315, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.Hawkhurst, Kent, England: イギリスケントハウクハルスト
ja.lifeSummary: Edward Barrettは約1249年にイギリスケントでBarrettの息子として生まれた。彼はMrs. Edward Barrettとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1315年にイギリスイギリスで67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Edward Barrett(은)는 대략 1249년 영국 켄트에서 Barrett의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Mrs. Edward Barrett(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1315년 영국 잉글랜드에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Edward Barrett nasceu aproximadamente 1249, em Kent, Inglaterra filho de Barrett. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Mrs. Edward Barrett. Ele faleceu em 1315, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Edward Barrett родился около 1249 г. в местности кэнт, Англия. Его отца звали Barrett. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Mrs. Edward Barrett. Он умер в 1315 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 67 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Edward Barrett nació aproximadamente 1249, en Kent, Inglaterra como hijo de Barrett. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Mrs. Edward Barrett. Murió en 1315, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 67 años.
